title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 338.120 - Board of pharmacy — organization
text:
338.120.  Board of pharmacy — organization. — Annually the board of pharmacy shall organize by the election of a president and vice president who shall hold their offices for one year and until their successors shall have been elected and qualified.
(RSMo 1939 § 10011, A.L. 1981 S.B. 16, A.L. 1997 S.B. 141) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 13147; 1919 § 4719; 1909 § 5771
